title: New DFU screen - Translations
scenario: Verify that all translations on the new DFU screen are correct, with no broken words and fully visible, when the phone language is set to a supported language and an update for EB/CC for Osprey is available.
steps: Set phone language to a supported language.
Open the app with an update for EB/CC for Osprey.
Navigate to the new DFU screen.
Check that all text is correct, with no broken words and fully visible.
expected: All text on the new DFU screen is correct, with no broken words and fully visible.
